calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Continued To Aug-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Nightingale, Esq. appearing representing Jaime Gutierrez, Administrator.

Hearing on Petition for Filing of a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to Aug-03-2026 at 09:00 a.m. in Department 204 pursuant to request of petitioner. Petition or status report must be filed, or probate will close.

Judge: Michael McNaughton; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Continued To Jun-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonathan Nightingale for administrator Jaime Gutierrez (via Zoom).

The matter was called for Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Nightingale reported that administration had been delayed due to issues with the decedent's death certificate, which required amendment before estate funds could be collected. He stated that the funds have now been gathered into an estate account, that the inventory and appraisal remains pending, and that a petition for final distribution is ready to be filed upon receipt of the inventory and appraisal.

Mr. Nightingale requested a continuance and that waivers of accounting have been obtained and will be filed.

The Court continued the matter to June 1, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Continued To Mar-30-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-13-2025 Continued To Mar-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonathan W. Nightingale for administrator Jaime Gutierrez (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Nightingale reported that the decedent's bank account was held jointly with their spouse, and had been frozen because of an error in the spouse's death certificate. He explained that the issue with the death certificate was being addressed with the state's vital records office, but the process had encountered repeated delays. He requested a continuance to allow time to obtain the corrected certificate, complete an inventory and appraisal and prepare a petition for final distribution.

The Court continued the matter to March 2, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
